title: Energy Balance Assessment in Metabolic Cages
author: Jason Kim
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.xwwfpfe
materials: Metabolic cage food and water baskets are calibrated.
Corncob bedding is added to the cages.

steps.title: Drink and food baskets are filled...
steps.instruction: Drink and food baskets are filled with water and appropriate diet.

steps.title: Mice are individually housed in metabolic...
steps.instruction: Mice are individually housed in metabolic cages and checked daily for access to food and water.

steps.title: Software is set to collect data...
steps.instruction: Software is set to collect data at selected interval for 3 consecutive days (72 hour measurement period).

steps.title: Post-run data are exported and analyzed using Microsoft Excel program
steps.instruction: Post-run data are exported and analyzed using Microsoft Excel program.

steps.title: Mice should be assessed for body...
steps.instruction: Mice should be assessed for body composition (whole body lean mass) prior to metabolic cage measurement in order to incorporate whole body lean mass data for energy expenditure calculation.

steps.title: Metabolic cages require monitoring on a...
steps.instruction: Metabolic cages require monitoring on a daily basis to ensure food and water are accessible to the mice.
